title: Character Reference Chain
description: Two-stage Midjourney reference chain for a character under Element Reference Generation Policy v2: stage_1 (V8/V8.1 narrative identity reference) -> stage_2 (V7 --oref omni-reference refinement) -> handoff to ChatGPT Images 2 for the scale-angle three-view pack. Metadata-only: stores prompt template references and external reference IDs, never image binaries. This record must never contain or modify pack_status, canon_lock, approved, locked, or selected lifecycle fields.

prompt_template_ref.description: Relative path to the operator prompt template, e.g. templates/element_reference_prompts/character_mj_v8_narrative_identity.md.

model_guidance_snapshot_ref.description: Relative path to the model_guidance_snapshot governing the Midjourney version used.

output_ref.description: External reference for the selected Stage 1 image. external://... once generated; pending_external://... while scaffolded.

full_body_required.description: Optional. Full body is not a quality gate under policy v2; defaults to not required when omitted.

prompt_template_ref.description: Relative path to the operator prompt template, e.g. templates/element_reference_prompts/character_mj_v7_oref_refinement.md.

input_ref.description: Must reference the Stage 1 output (the image uploaded as the V7 Omni Reference).

output_ref.description: External reference for the refined omni-reference identity lock.

uses_oref.description: Stage 2 uses Midjourney V7 --oref; expected true.

source_reference_id.description: The reference ID the ChatGPT Images 2 scale-angle pack consumes as source_reference_id. Mirrors stage_2.output_ref identity.
